themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The LORD is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear? the LORD is the strength of my life...". Word-study detail reinforces "יִירָ֪א: shall not fear - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".

themes.label: Guidance
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes leading, direction, teaching, or the path God sets before His people. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The prayer 'Teach me thy way, O LORD, and lead me in a plain path, because of mine enemies' c...". Word-study detail reinforces "וּ֭נְחֵנִי: and lead - to guide; by implication, to transport (into exile, or as colonists)".
